_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: Growth curves over time of orthotopically transplanted human PRC2-WT (M3) and PRC2-loss (M14) cell line–derived xenografts (CDX) in CB-17 SCID mice treated with DAC
details: Used for orthotopic transplantation of human PRC2-WT and PRC2-loss MPNST cell lines to evaluate DAC treatment effects
